meta.note: 用于 Step1：直接消费场景设计文档中的 `4. 解构`，生成同一主体的主图与同名 JSON 提示词记录。

prompt_record.source_design_document: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/场景/2-设计/S###-<场景名>.md

local_sync.local_asset_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/场景/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.<ext>
local_sync.download_command: libtv download -p <LIBTV_CANVAS_UUID> -n <LIBTV_NODE_ID_OR_NAME> -o projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/场景/3-生成 | not_applicable_when_already_present_or_copied

prompt_record.output_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/场景/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.<ext>

prompt_payload.source_deconstruction_quote: <直接引用或压缩场景设计文档 ## 4. 解构 的内容>
critical_requirements: Use the corresponding scene design document's section `4. 解构` as the primary source of truth.
Do not use the former English integrated prompt from `提示词设计` as the imported source for Midjourney V8.1.
Generate one coherent single-subject scene main image only; do not redesign the scene, change its era, architecture, material logic, lighting direction, narrative function, or no-human guardrails.
Add only libTV canvas-node execution details and the required Midjourney suffix; do not add new story facts, people, creatures, silhouettes, or unrelated landmarks.
The output image must be suitable as the reference anchor for the Step2 scene multi-view sheet.
prompt_payload.state_variant_policy: When prompt_record.asset_preflight.asset_reuse_decision is generate_state_variant, use Lib Image with the base reference node and describe only the state delta while preserving scene identity, spatial skeleton, light logic, render style, and 16:9 aspect.
prompt_payload.assembled_prompt: <SOURCE_DECONSTRUCTION_QUOTE + concise libTV canvas-node execution wrapper + midjourney_suffix>
prompt_payload.negative_prompt: no people, no creatures, no silhouettes, no human-shaped shadows, no unrelated architecture, no scene redesign, no different era, no inconsistent materials, no random labels, no poster typography
